Added_Other.name: DFFlagDataStoreEnableModernRequestCounters_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements modern tracking for data store requests with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data management and performance for games using data stores.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on data requests for ordered lists within a specific universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes data management and performance for games, leading to smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests a player can make for ordered lists in a game.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by reducing server load and ensuring fair access to data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limits on data store requests with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by managing data access more effectively.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data requests a player can make to manage server load.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair access to data for all players, preventing any single player from overwhelming the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for removing data from stores with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more efficient data management, improving game performance and player experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Changes the limit on how many data requests can be made per player in a game.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage player data more effectively, enhancing game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on ordered write requests in data stores based on the universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the efficiency of data storage for games, allowing for smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store write requests per player to improve performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing server overload from too many data writes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many requests can be made to data stores for specific universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing overload from too many data requests.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store requests per player based on the game universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by managing data requests more efficiently.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for reading data from the data store with a universe filter applied.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and reliability when accessing player data across different game universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of data store reads per player, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data resources, preventing any single player from overloading the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes fixed request limits for standard data store removal operations based on the universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more flexible data management, enhancing gameplay stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Increases the limit on data store requests per player for specific universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to save and load more data without hitting request limits.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of write requests to data stores based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and stability of data storage, ensuring smoother gameplay experiences.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data store write requests a player can make, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps manage server performance and ensures fair usage of data storage, enhancing gameplay stability.

Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and ensure players are using the latest features.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are handled.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures more accurate and timely updates for in-game messages.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for repository tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and efficiency in tracking changes in the codebase.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance, making the game run more smoothly for players.
